title: Christmas Wreath Making Supplies, 205 Pine Cones Dried Cotton Balls, Dried Orange Slices and Cinnamon Sticks, Star Anise, Pinecone Berries Garland Making kit for Xmas Tree Decor Fall Winter Crafts
features: 【Package Include】15pcs natural pinecones, 5pcs snow-tipped pinecones, 100 red berries, 50pcs frosted berries, 10pcs orange slices, 5pcs cinnamon sticks, 5pcs star anise, 3m jute twine string, 5pcs dried cotton balls, and 10pcs pine branches, sufficient to meet your needs for crafts and holiday decoration.

【Suitable Size】The pine cone is 3-4cm, the snow-tipped pinecone is 3-4cm, the ordinary red berry is 1.2cm in diameter, the snow-tipped berry is 1.4cm in diameter, dried orange slices approx 4-5cm, star anise approx 2-3cm, cinnamon sticks approx 8cm.

【Wreath Making Kit】The Christmas pine cones, oranges, star anise, dried cotton balls, and cinnamon sticks are natural, and the fake Xmas berries and pine picks are made of quality PVC, which is eco-friendly, durable, odorless, lightweight, not easy to fade, and reusable, can be used for a long time.

【Make Your Own Christmas Wreath】YUNSTK artificial pine branch sets are super realistic with natural texture and vivid color, just look real. The natural pine cones combined with red berries and pine picks make this fruit set a great decoration addition to this winter holiday and Christmas.

【Christmas Decor】Suitable for Christmas decor themes, Christmas wreath making, Christmas tree decoration, table centerpieces, home decor, banquets, flower arrangements, and more, also be used as presents to your friends or family members.
description: Suitable decorating Christmas holly wreaths, Xmas pine wreaths, artificial wreaths, Christmas floral arrangements, and seasonal garlands. Package includes: 15pcs natural pinecones, 5pcs snow-tipped pinecones, 100pcs red berries, 50pcs frosted berries, 10pcs orange slices, 5pcs cinnamon sticks, 5pcs star anise, 3m jute twine string, 5pcs dried cotton balls, and 10pcs pine branches. Warm Tips: Natural pine cones, oranges, star anise, and cinnamon sticks may come in different sizes, colors, and shapes. These are uncontrollable factors, but they do not affect appearance and natural uses.
